popularStory.headline: B.      LORDS BASSET of DRAYTON BASSET, STAFFORDSHIRE
popularStory.description: RALPH Basset, son of RICHARD Basset & his wife Matilda Ridel (-1160).  "Radulfus Basset filius Ricardi Basset" confirmed the donation of "terram de Niwebold…de feodo de Colestona" to Eynsham abbey mad …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Basset於大約1131年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特時，他的父親Richard Basset Chief Justice of England42歲，母親Matilda Ridel28歲。他於1153年與Alice De Peverel在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1217年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾可利其德雷頓享年87歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾可利其德雷頓。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Basset was born about 1131, in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Basset Chief Justice of England, was 42 and his mother, Matilda Ridel, was 28. He married Alice De Peverel in 1153, in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1217, in Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 87, and was buried in Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Basset est né environ 1131, à Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Basset Chief Justice of England, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Matilda Ridel, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Alice De Peverel en 1153, à Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1217, à Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterré à Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1153 in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Alice De Peverel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1217 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Basset è nato il circa 1131 nel Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Basset Chief Justice of England, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Matilda Ridel, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Alice De Peverel nel 1153, nel Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1217, nel Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 87 anni, e fu sepolto a Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Bassetが約1131年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットで生まれた時，父Richard Basset Chief Justice of Englandは42歳，母Matilda Ridelは28歳であった。1153年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットでAlice De Peverelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1217年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアペンクリッジドレイトンで87歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアペンクリッジドレイトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Basset(이)가 대략 1131년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Basset Chief Justice of England(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda Ridel(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1153년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯에서 Alice De Peverel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1217년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 펜크리지 드라이턴에서 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 펜크리지 드라이턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Basset nasceu aproximadamente 1131, em Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Basset Chief Justice of England, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Ridel, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice De Peverel em 1153, em Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1217, em Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 87 anos, e foi sepultado em Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Basset родился около 1131 г. в местности дреитон бассетт, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Basset Chief Justice of England было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda Ridel, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice De Peverel в 1153 г. в местности дреитон бассетт, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1217 г. в местности дреитон, пенкридж, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 87 лет и был похоронен в местности дреитон, пенкридж, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
